text:
Created attachment 168693
Patch to update multimedia/handbrake to 0.10.5

* Update multimedia/handbrake to 0.10.5
* Remove FDK AAC encoder, due to upstream license dispute [1]

  [1] https://forum.handbrake.fr/viewtopic.php?f=33&t=34143

  Changes:
    https://handbrake.fr/news.php?article=36
